mnemonics.title: OGF vs EGF
mnemonics.content: OGF: Ordinary = Original sequence; EGF: Exponential = Enhanced with n!

mnemonics.title: GF Operations
mnemonics.content: ADD GFs = Combine sequences; MULTIPLY = Convolve sequences

acronyms.usage: Basic sequence encoding with x^n terms

visualTips.visualization: Imagine sliding two number lines and multiplying overlapping terms
Picture plucking the x^n term from a polynomial

analogies.analogy: DNA of a sequence - compact blueprint containing all information
Combining two LEGO sets to build new structures
